title: Adam spawned from Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Adam spawned from Lilith? Post by Knoxer » Tue Jul 10, 2007 10:04 pm Okay, while rewatching EoE I noticed something every strange in the scene where Misato is telling Shinji humans are the 18th Angel... along that Adam s spawned from Lilith, Here is the text... "You see Shinji, human being were spawned from a being called Lilith, just like Adam was." Now how is this possible? Adam is the first Angel and Lilith being the second. Any help would greatly be appreciated.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 10, 2007 10:07 pm Bad translation. Please read: http://www.evaotaku.com/misatolines.html

[]: Post by Knoxer » Tue Jul 10, 2007 10:10 pm Ah, thanks for clearing that up! Now I can go back to eva less confused than normal.
